    Module: immuno_tabular

    module-immuno-tabular.Rmd

    Purpose

    immuno_tabular generates tabular summaries of vaccine immunogenicity: geometric mean titres (GMTs), geometric mean ratios (GMRs), and response rates by treatment arm, baseline serostatus, and timepoint.

    Source module: correlates_reporting2/immuno_tabular/
    Key report: immuno_tabular/report.Rmd

    Example data 

    report_root  <- "/path/to/correlates_reporting2"
moderna_path <- file.path(
  report_root, "data_clean",
  "moderna_mock_data_processed_with_riskscore.csv"
)

    Reproduce the report

    1. Configure the session 

    library(utilrep2)

report_root <- "/path/to/correlates_reporting2"
setup_session(
  trial       = "moderna_mock",
  platform    = "linux",
  data_path   = file.path(report_root, "data_clean"),
  report_root = report_root
)

    2. Run the module 

    run_immuno_tabular(trial = "moderna_mock")

    This executes, in order:

    1. make_parameters.R — loads config.yml and defines trial-specific assay labels, timepoints, and thresholds.
    2. make_clean_data.R — reads the raw processed CSV, applies exclusions, and writes the analysis-ready dataset to data_clean/.
    3. make_table_all.R (or a trial-specific variant) — computes and formats all GMT/GMR/response-rate tables.
    # Skip deleting previous output
run_immuno_tabular(trial = "moderna_mock", clean = FALSE)

    3. Build the chapter PDF 

    build_chapter_report("immuno_tabular", trial = "moderna_mock")

    Output

    Tables are saved as .Rdata and .pdf files under immuno_tabular/output/<trial>/.

    Report sections (from report.Rmd)

    • GMT and GMR tables by timepoint
    • Response rate tables (responder threshold analysis)
    • Fold-rise tables (D29/D57 over baseline)

    Supported trials

    Trial Script dispatched
    moderna_mock, moderna_real, and most standard trials make_table_all.R
    prevent19_stage2 make_table_all_stg2.R
    nextgen_mock make_table_all_nextGen.R (D31 to M12)

    Developed by Y H.

    Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
